query: cheap lens vintage analog photograph soft focus optical distortion
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — vintage cheap-optic look, soft-focus analog distortion

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a short-sleeved patterned button-down shirt and a dark purple tie plays a drum kit in a warmly lit indoor venue. Cymbals, drum hardware, and microphone stands are arranged around the musician, while small lights and draped fabric are visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A drummer in a patterned shirt and purple tie is rendered with extreme motion blur while striking cymbals and drums in a warmly lit indoor venue. The photograph is aggressively tilted, rotated nearly ninety degrees, and tightly cropped so that portions of the musician and drum hardware are cut off at the frame edges, producing a chaotic and disorienting composition.
